findings.evidence: <main> at line 27 contains another <main> at line 36. Only one <main> landmark is valid per document.

findings.description: Flow Regime Changes bar chart is missing from the HTML conversion
findings.evidence: PDF page 15 displays a bar chart titled 'Stream Condition Middle Deep River (Node 280) June - November' showing % of Days at Flow Level across Unimpaired, 2003, 2030, and 2050 Demands scenarios with color-coded QAA range bars. The HTML replaces this chart with a text-only bullet list of the QAA legend items and a sentence listing the scenarios, losing the visual data entirely.

findings.description: Project Organization Venn diagram is missing from the HTML conversion
findings.evidence: PDF page 19 displays a Venn diagram of three overlapping circles showing project roles: 'Data Collection / HDR', 'Model Development / HydroLogics', and 'Data, Model Evaluation & Plan Development / NCDWR'. The HTML replaces this diagram with plain bullet-point text, losing the visual representation of the overlapping responsibilities between the three entities.

findings.description: Table 4-3 (Water Supply Demand & Deficits) content is duplicated: it appears both as an embedded image AND as a fully rendered HTML <table> with identical data. The PDF contains this information only once.
findings.evidence: HTML contains both '' and a full '' with the same six rows (Orange-Alamance, Hillsborough, Piedmont Minerals, Raleigh, Durham, SGWASA) immediately after. PDF page 16 shows this data only once.

findings.description: The bar chart for 'Stream Condition Middle Deep River (Node 280)' flow regime changes from PDF page 15 is missing as an image in the HTML. Only the chart's legend categories and scenario labels are rendered as text bullet points.
findings.evidence: PDF page 15 contains a substantive grouped bar chart showing '% of Days at Flow Level' across Unimpaired, 2003, 2030, and 2050 Demands scenarios. The HTML section 'Flow Regime Changes' has no tag — only text listing the legend categories and a sentence 'Scenarios evaluated: Unimpaired, 2003 Demands, 2030 Demands, 2050 Demands'.

findings.description: The Venn diagram from PDF page 19 showing project organization relationships (overlapping circles for HDR, HydroLogics, and NCDWR) is missing as an image in the HTML. It was converted to a plain text bullet list only.
findings.evidence:
PDF page 19 shows a three-circle Venn diagram illustrating overlap between Data Collection (HDR), Model Development (HydroLogics), and Data/Model Evaluation & Plan Development (NCDWR). The HTML 'Project Organization' section has no tag, rendering it as '
  • Data Collection: HDR
    • ...'.

findings.description: The HTML adds the phrase 'Scenarios evaluated:' before listing chart x-axis labels from the flow regime bar chart. This phrase does not appear in the PDF.
findings.evidence: HTML states: 'Scenarios evaluated: Unimpaired, 2003 Demands, 2030 Demands, 2050 Demands'. PDF page 15 shows these only as x-axis labels on the bar chart without the introductory phrase 'Scenarios evaluated:'.
